label: IPMI, iDRAC, and iLO discovery
description: Aggregate out-of-band management discovery check for IPMI, Dell iDRAC, HP/HPE iLO, virtual console, and virtual-media exposures. It runs IPMI version and Cipher Zero NSE checks, TCP service/CPE discovery on common management ports, VNC console metadata checks, and flags Supermicro BMC configuration disclosure proof opportunities without downloading credentials.
